queries.question: List all exchange-traded products and also display unit investment trusts with an exit fee of 0.01.
queries.sql:
SELECT Exchange_traded_Products.ProductName as name
FROM Exchange_traded_Products
UNION
SELECT Unit_investment_Trusts.TrustName as name
FROM Unit_investment_Trusts
WHERE Unit_investment_Trusts.ExitFee = 0.01

queries.question: Display exchange-traded products and unit investment trusts with an exit fee of 0.01.
queries.sql:
SELECT Exchange_traded_Products.ProductName as name
FROM Exchange_traded_Products
WHERE Exchange_traded_Products.ExitFee = 0.01
UNION
SELECT Unit_investment_Trusts.TrustName as name
FROM Unit_investment_Trusts
WHERE Unit_investment_Trusts.ExitFee = 0.01

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display exchange-traded products and unit investment trusts with an exit fee of 0.01.
